3328850.name: WarpedSpace Demo
3328850.description:
WarpedSpace is a sci-fi survival adventure game set in deep space. A massive, open environment full of wonder and peril awaits you!

                                         🚀 Warped Space Demo is LIVE ! 🚀
                          🎮 Play the Demo & Wishlist Warped Space Today! 🎮
                                  📅 Available for a limited time – try it NOW!

                          Adding Localization : Upvote your Language on Discord

Dive Into a Vast Space Adventure

You awake in space, and the only way to go is everywhere!

Both on foot and in your spacecraft explore "open world" space and discover a mix of environments.

WarpedSpace's environments range from asteroid belts, gas clouds, space wrecks, outposts and more.

Manage your food, oxygen and water supply and even upgrade your Eva Suite as you explore space and land.

You may discover some life: Some times helpful, often harmful.

What's in the Demo

The demo lets you experience a slice of the game 
Survive Craft and Explore 

Explore the mystery of this Space Adventure

How did you get here? Are you alone? What will you Discover in WarpedSpace.

Want to make suggestions ?

Then join our Discord => See Steam Links
